untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of simultaneous trendline breakouts (short-term and long-term), head-and-shoulders patterns, Gann lines, and lunar cycles. These are pattern-recognition and cyclical indicators not available in the allowed indicator set. The concept of 'multiple signals converging at or near a single price point' requires multi-timeframe trendline analysis and pattern matching beyond standard technical indicators. Implemented a simplified proxy using moving average crossovers as a convergence signal, but this does not capture the full intent of the original signal.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_3 describes multi-signal convergence at price levels, including trendlines, H&S patterns, Gann lines, and cycles. Since trendline breakouts, Gann analysis, and cyclical indicators are not in the allowed set, translated to short-term (SMA 20) and long-term (SMA 50) moving average convergence as a proxy for signal convergence. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect the signal's non-directional nature. Exit condition reversed from entry as per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.
